title: Property Consultant - Housing.com - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Housing.com - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Housing.com has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Housing.com:
Housing.com is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com!
